meaning: 1. evening newspaper; 2. (in a newspaper's name) Evening News
sentence: 他下班路上买了一份晚报。
pinyin: Tā xiàbān lùshang mǎi le yī fèn wǎnbào.
english: He bought an evening newspaper on his way home from work.

meaning: 1. willingness; 2. would rather (agree to X than Y)
sentence: 她情愿走路上班，也不想挤地铁。
pinyin: Tā qíngyuàn zǒulù shàngbān, yě bù xiǎng jǐ dìtiě.
english: She would rather walk to work than squeeze onto the subway.

sentence: 他们周末徒步爬了一座山。
pinyin: Tāmen zhōumò túbù páile yī zuò shān.
english: They hiked up a mountain on the weekend.

sentence: 她已是九十岁高龄，身体依然很健康。
pinyin: Tā yǐ shì jiǔshí suì gāolíng, shēntǐ yīrán hěn jiànkāng.
english: She is already ninety years old and still in very good health.

meaning: 1. to be willing to part with sth
pinyin: Tā shě de huā shíjiān péi háizi.
english: She is willing to spend time with her kids.
